calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: Plaintiff DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Appearances:

Japera Smith, in person, in propria persona Defendant.

No other appearances.

Ruling - discussed. At the conclusion of discussion, the court confirms the following tentative ruling:

Defendant Smith's claim of exemption is granted in part. The Sheriff is directed to release the $705.01 currently held to the plaintiff creditor. All other sums to be returned to the debtor. The levying officer is directed to withhold $100 per pay period (every two weeks) from defendant's earnings, as agreed upon in open court.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

****After hearing: an order is signed. (See scanned order for details)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-13-2023 Continued To Jun-27-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Defendant/judgment debtor JAPERA SMITH (Tel: 415-368-6726) in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The Court notes Ms. Smith did not contest the Court's tentative ruling and that the opposing side is not present.

The Court permits this matter to be continued to June 27, 2023 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302.

The Court reminds Ms. Smith that she must properly inform the other side of her intent to appear on June 27, 2023 if she wishes to contest the Court's tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/RBU)

***** Counsel for plaintiff/judgment creditor informed of 6/27/23 hearing date via email dated 6/13/23. (302/RBU) *****
